positive: A stylized, highly symmetrical vector illustration of a whimsical bioluminescent forest scene. The composition features large, clean silhouettes of stylized flora (mushrooms, ferns, stylized leaves) and floating glowing spores, centered perfectly. Use strong contrast between deep midnight blues and vibrant neon accents of electric teal, lavender, and lime green. The art style should emulate a sophisticated, detailed woodcut print combined with modern digital vector art. Focus on clean lines, graphic weight, and a dreamy, ethereal mood. Perfect for apparel printing, isolated on a solid background. Minimal shading, maximum visual impact.
negative: text, watermark, logo, signature, cropped, low resolution, blur, poor anatomy, extra limbs, artifacts, noise, dirty background, grunge, photorealism, sketch, grayscale
